---
name: Bug report
about: Something doesn't work as expected (NOT for security issues)
title: ""
labels: bug
---

> ⚠️ **Security issue?** Stop — do not file it here. Report privately per
> [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md). **Never paste a real secret value** in an issue;
> redact it.

**What happened**
A clear description of the bug.

**To reproduce**
Steps / the exact command(s). Redact any secret values.

**Expected**
What you expected instead.

**Environment**
- kovra version (`kovra --version`):
- macOS version / chip:
- Install method (Homebrew / cargo / source):

**Logs / output**
Relevant output, with secrets redacted.
